transcript: Speaker A: हा scene English मध्ये कसा सांगशील? [How would you say this scene in English?] Speaker B: Man is dancing in some costume. Speaker C: हे पूर्णपणे चुकीचं नाही, पण... थोडं better असं म्हणू शकतो. [This is not completely wrong, but... we can say it a bit better.] Speaker C: A person in a giant yellow costume is energetically dancing and spinning at a celebration while guests watch. Speaker B: Oh... बरं बरं. मला English चांगलं येत नाही. [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English well.] Speaker C: हरकत नाही. AI teacher try केलास का पण? [No problem. But did you try the AI teacher?] Speaker B: पण ते महाग असतील ना? [But they must be expensive, right?] Speaker C: अजिबात नाही. Normal English classes पेक्षा 7 पट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून 1 कोटी लोग MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi.] Speaker B: पण time मिळत नाही. [But I don't get time.] Speaker C: रोज फक्त 15-20 मिनिटं practice पुरेशी आहे. हळूहळू तू confidently English बोलायला लागशील. [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough. Gradually you will start speaking English confidently.] Speaker B: Wow! कसं join करू? [Wow! How do I join?] Speaker C: Install बटनावर click कर. MySivi app install कर. फक्त 15 दिवसांत improvement दिसायला लागेल. [Click on the install button. Install the MySivi app. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days.]
on_screen_text: हा SCENE ENGLISH मध्ये कसा सांगशील? [How would you say this scene in English?] MAN IS DANCING IN SOME COSTUME. हे पूर्णपणे चुकीचं नाही, पण... थोडं better असं म्हणू शकतो [This is not completely wrong, but... we can say it a bit better] A PERSON IN A GIANT YELLOW COSTUME IS ENERGETICALLY DANCING AND SPINNING AT A CELEBRATION WHILE GUESTS WATCH. Oh... बरं बरं [Oh... okay okay] मला English चांगलं येत नाही [I don't know English well] हरकत नाही AI teacher try केलास का पण [No problem, but did you try the AI teacher] ते महाग असतील ना [They must be expensive, right] अजिबात नाही [Not at all] Normal English classes पेक्षा [Than normal English classes] 7 पट स्वस्त आहे [7 times cheaper] 7X CHEAPER म्हणून 1 कोटी लोक MySivi वर English practice करत आहेत [That's why 1 crore people are practicing English on MySivi] पण time मिळत नाही [But I don't get time] रोज फक्त 15-20 मिनिटं practice पुरेशी आहे [Just 15-20 minutes of practice daily is enough] हळूहळू तू confidently English बोलायला लागशील [Gradually you will start speaking English confidently] Wow कसं join करू [Wow how do I join] Install बटनावर click कर [Click on the install button] MySivi app install कर [Install the MySivi app] फक्त 15 दिवसांत improvement दिसायला लागेल [You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days]
summary: An AI avatar corrects a user's basic English description of a video clip, demonstrating how to speak more fluently. The ad highlights the MySivi app as an affordable, time-efficient AI English teacher that helps users speak confidently with just 15 minutes of daily practice. It concludes with a call-to-action to install the app for visible improvement in 15 days.
